description: Create a complex Linux build GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for building with various configurations and compilers, and another for running clang-tidy. The build job should use a matrix strategy to run multiple builds with different compilers, C++ standards, and CMake configurations. Each build should check out the code, prepare the environment, configure the build, build, and test. The clang-tidy job should check out the code, prepare the environment, configure, and run clang-tidy.
